---
title: "Using"
description: "Learn how to use and customize templates from CodeRocket"
icon: "shopping-cart"
---

Learn how to discover, use, and customize templates from CodeRocket.

## Getting Started

### Account Requirements
- Free or premium CodeRocket account
- Valid payment method (for premium templates only)
- Email for purchase receipts (for premium templates)

### Browsing Templates

<Steps>
  <Step title="Visit Templates">
    Navigate to the [Templates](https://coderocket.app/templates) from the sidebar
  </Step>
  <Step title="Filter & Search">
    Use categories and search to find templates that match your needs
  </Step>
  <Step title="Preview Templates">
    Click on templates to see detailed previews, descriptions, and demos
  </Step>
</Steps>

## Using Templates

### 1. Select Your Template
- Browse by category or search for specific needs
- Read the description and view preview
- Check the demo URL if available
- Review pricing (free or premium)

### 2. Access Process
<Steps>
  <Step title="Free Templates">
    Click "Use This Template" for instant access
  </Step>
  <Step title="Premium Templates">
    Click "Purchase for $X.XX" and complete Stripe checkout
  </Step>
  <Step title="Access Template">
    You'll get immediate access to your template
  </Step>
</Steps>

### 3. What You Get
When you use a template, you receive:
- **Full source code** access
- **All assets** (images, icons, etc.)
- **Template files** in your preferred framework
- **Documentation** and usage instructions
- **Lifetime access** to your template

## Accessing Your Templates

### My Templates Page
View all your used templates:
- Go to **My Templates** in the sidebar
- See usage history and dates
- Access download and export options

### Download Options
<CardGroup cols={2}>
  <Card title="Direct Download" icon="download">
    Download template files as a ZIP archive for local development
  </Card>
  <Card title="GitHub Export" icon="github">
    Export directly to a GitHub repository for version control
  </Card>
</CardGroup>

## Using Your Templates

### What's Included in Downloads

```
template-name/
├── src/
│   ├── components/     # React/Vue/HTML files
│   ├── styles/        # CSS/Tailwind styles
│   └── utils/         # Helper functions
├── assets/
│   ├── images/        # Template images
│   └── icons/         # Icon files
├── package.json       # Dependencies
├── README.md         # Usage instructions
└── preview.html      # Live preview
```

### Installation & Setup

<Steps>
  <Step title="Download Template">
    Download the ZIP file from your templates page
  </Step>
  <Step title="Extract Files">
    Extract to your project directory or desired location
  </Step>
  <Step title="Install Dependencies">
    Run `npm install` to install required packages
  </Step>
  <Step title="Import Template">
    Follow the README instructions to integrate into your project
  </Step>
</Steps>

## GitHub Integration

### Exporting to GitHub

<Steps>
  <Step title="Connect GitHub">
    Link your GitHub account in account settings if not already connected
  </Step>
  <Step title="Choose Repository">
    Select existing repository or create a new one
  </Step>
  <Step title="Auto-Export">
    Template files are automatically committed to a new branch
  </Step>
  <Step title="Clone & Develop">
    Clone the repository and start customizing
  </Step>
</Steps>

### Benefits of GitHub Export
- **Version Control**: Track all your changes
- **Collaboration**: Work with team members
- **Backup**: Your templates are safely stored
- **CI/CD**: Integrate with deployment pipelines

## Payment & Billing

### Free Templates
- **No payment required** for free templates
- **Instant access** to source code
- **Full customization** rights

### Premium Templates
- All payments processed through Stripe
- Support for major credit/debit cards
- Secure, PCI-compliant transactions
- Instant purchase confirmation

### Receipts & Records
- Email receipts sent automatically (premium templates)
- Usage history in your account
- Downloadable invoices available (premium templates)
- Tax information included (premium templates)

### Refund Policy
<Info>
  Due to the digital nature of templates, all sales are final. Please preview carefully before purchasing premium templates.
</Info>

## Frequently Asked Questions

<AccordionGroup>
  <Accordion title="Can I modify used templates?">
    Yes! You get full source code access and can modify templates however you need for your projects.
  </Accordion>

  <Accordion title="Can I use templates commercially?">
    Yes, used templates can be used in commercial projects without additional licensing fees.
  </Accordion>

  <Accordion title="What if I lose my files?">
    You have lifetime access to your templates. You can re-download anytime from your My Templates page.
  </Accordion>

  <Accordion title="Do I get updates to templates?">
    You get the template version available at time of use. Updates may be released as new versions.
  </Accordion>

  <Accordion title="Can I resell templates?">
    No, you cannot resell used templates. They're licensed for your use only.
  </Accordion>
</AccordionGroup>

## Support

Need help with your templates?

- **Technical Issues**: Contact support through the app
- **Customization Help**: Check our [Customization Guide](/templates/customization)
- **Community**: Join our [Discord](https://discord.gg/t7dQgcYJ5t) for tips and help
- **Creator Questions**: Contact the template creator directly

Ready to start using templates? Visit the [Templates](https://coderocket.app/templates) to browse available templates!
